glosses.ja: 義務づける; 強制する

translations.de: Du bringst mich dazu, spät zu bleiben.
translations.it: Mi fai restare fino a tardi.
translations.ko: 너 때문에 늦게까지 남아 있어야 해.
translations.pt: Você me faz ficar até tarde.
translations.he: אתה גורם לי להישאר עד מאוחר.
translations.tr: Beni geç saatlere kadar kalmak zorunda bırakıyorsun.
translations.vi: Bạn bắt tôi ở lại đến khuya.
translations.ar: أنت تجعلني أبقى حتى وقت متأخر.
translations.nl: Je zorgt ervoor dat ik laat moet bleiben.
translations.hi: तुम मुझे देर तक रुकने पर मजबूर करते हो.
translations.el: Με αναγκάζεις να μένω μέχρι αργά.
translations.nb: Du får meg til å jobbe sent.
translations.sv: Du får mig att stanna sent.
translations.ro: Mă faci să stau până târziu.
translations.da: Du får mig til at blive længe.
translations.ja: あなたのせいで遅くまで残らなきゃいけない。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the verb 'obliges'.
Clitic object pronoun (1st person singular) placed before the verb; direct object of 'obliges'.
Main lexical verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; governs 'à' + infinitive indicating the compelled action.
Preposition introducing the infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb; head of the infinitival clause complement of 'obliges'.
Adverb modifying 'rester', expressing lateness.

sentences.target: On oblige les élèves à participer.

translations.fr: On oblige les élèves à participer.
translations.es: Obligamos a los alumnos a participar.
translations.de: Wir verpflichten die Schüler zur Teilnahme.
translations.pt: Nós obrigamos os alunos a participar.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi buộc học sinh phải tham gia.
translations.nl: We verplichten de leerlingen om mee te doen.
translations.hi: हम छात्रों को भाग लेने के लिए बाध्य करते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi tvinger elevene til å delta.
translations.id: Kami mewajibkan para siswa untuk berpartisipasi.
translations.ro: Îi obligăm pe elevi să participe.
translations.ja: 私たちは生徒に参加を義務づけている。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/general subject pronoun; subject of 'oblige'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; takes a direct object and an 'à' + infinitive complement.
Definite article determiner, plural; introduces the noun 'élèves' as the direct object.
Common noun, plural; direct object of 'oblige'.
Preposition introducing the infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'à', indicating the action required.

sentences.target: Je ne veux pas obliger mon frère à venir.
sentences.reading: /ʒə nə vø pa ɔbliʒe mɔ̃ fʁɛʁ a vəniʁ/

translations.fr: Je ne veux pas obliger mon frère à venir.
translations.ipa: /ʒə nə vø pa ɔbliʒe mɔ̃ fʁɛʁ a vəniʁ/
translations.en: I don’t want to force my brother to come.
translations.es: No quiero obligar a mi hermano a venir.
translations.de: Ich will meinen Bruder nicht zwingen, zu kommen.
translations.it: Non voglio costringere mio fratello a venire.
translations.ko: 나는 동생을 오도록 강요하고 싶지 않다.
translations.ru: Я не хочу заставлять своего брата приходить.
translations.pt: Eu não quero obrigar meu irmão a vir.
translations.he: אני לא רוצה להכריח את אחי לבוא.
translations.vi: Tôi không muốn ép em trai tôi đến.
translations.ar: لا أريد أن أجبر أخي على المجيء.
translations.nl: Ik wil mijn broer niet dwingen om te komen.
translations.uk: Я не хочу змушувати свого брата приходити.
translations.hu: Nem akarom kényszeríteni a testvéremet, hogy eljöjjön.
translations.hi: मैं अपने भाई को आने के लिए मजबूर नहीं करना चाहता.
translations.pl: Nie chcę zmuszać mojego brata do przyjścia.
translations.el: Δεν θέλω να αναγκάσω τον αδελφό μου να έρθει.
translations.nb: Jeg vil ikke tvinge broren min til å komme.
translations.id: Saya tidak ingin memaksa saudara laki-laki saya untuk datang.
translations.sv: Jag vill inte tvinga min bror att komma.
translations.ro: Nu vreau să-l oblig pe fratele meu să vină.
translations.cs: Nechci nutit svého bratra, aby přišel.
translations.da: Jeg vil ikke tvinge min bror til at komme.
translations.ja: 弟を無理に来させたくない。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of 'veux'.
Negation particle; first element of the discontinuous negation 'ne ... pas' around the finite verb.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; takes infinitival complement 'obliger'; negated by 'ne ... pas'.
Adverbial negator completing 'ne ... pas'.
Infinitive verb complement of 'veux'; selects a direct object ('mon frère') and 'à' + infinitive.
Possessive determiner agreeing in gender/number with 'frère' (masculine singular).
Common noun; direct object of 'obliger'.
Preposition introducing the infinitival complement of 'obliger'.
Infinitive verb; the action 'frère' would be obliged to do.

sentences.target: Vous obligez toujours vos enfants à ranger.
sentences.reading: /vu zɔbliʒe tuʒuʁ vo zɑ̃fɑ̃ a ʁɑ̃ʒe/

translations.fr: Vous obligez toujours vos enfants à ranger.
translations.ipa: /vu zɔbliʒe tuʒuʁ vo zɑ̃fɑ̃ a ʁɑ̃ʒe/
translations.en: You always make your kids tidy up.
translations.es: Siempre obligan a sus hijos a ordenar.
translations.de: Ihr zwingt eure Kinder immer zum Aufräumen.
translations.it: Costringete sempre i vostri figli a riordinare.
translations.zh-Hans: 你们总是让你们的孩子整理房间。
translations.yue: 你哋成日叫你哋嘅小朋友執嘢。
translations.ru: Вы всегда заставляете своих детей убирать.
translations.pt: Vocês sempre fazem seus filhos arrumar a bagunça.
translations.he: אתם תמיד גורמים לילדים שלכם לסדר.
translations.vi: Bạn luôn bắt con mình dọn dẹp.
translations.nl: Jullie laten jullie kinderen alltid opruimen.
translations.uk: Ви завжди змушуєте своїх дітей прибирати.
translations.hu: Mindig rákényszerítitek a gyerekeiteket, hogy rendet rakjanak.
translations.hi: आप हमेशा अपने बच्चों से सफाई करवाते हैं.
translations.el: Πάντα υποχρεώνετε τα παιδιά σας να τακτοποιούν.
translations.nb: Dere får alltid barna deres til å rydde.
translations.id: Kalian selalu menyuruh anak-anak kalian beres-beres.
translations.sv: Ni får alltid era barn att städa.
translations.ro: Îi obligați mereu pe copiii voștri să facă ordine.
translations.da: I får altid jeres børn til at rydde op.
translations.ja: あなたたちはいつも子どもに片付けさせる。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person plural/formal; subject of 'obligez'.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person plural; takes direct object and 'à' + infinitive.
Adverb of frequency modifying 'obligez'.
Possessive determiner, plural; agrees with 'enfants'.
Common noun, plural; direct object of 'obligez'.
Preposition introducing the infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb; the action the children are made to do.

Wir verpflichten die Schüler zur Teilnahme.

Non voglio costringere mio fratello a venire.

आप हमेशा अपने बच्चों से सफाई करवाते हैं.

Vi tvinger elevene til å delta.

I får altid jeres børn til at rydde op.
